name: Overstayed Allocations
query:
SELECT
    name as "Allocation:Link/Room Allocation:130",
    employee as "Employee:Link/Employee:130",
    camp as "Camp:Link/Camp Master:110",
    room as "Room:Link/Room Master:110",
    bed as "Bed:Link/Bed Master:110",
    check_in_date as "Check-In:Date:100",
    expected_check_out_date as "Expected Check-Out:Date:140",
    DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), expected_check_out_date) as "Days Overdue:Int:110"
FROM `tabRoom Allocation`
WHERE allocation_status = 'Active'
    AND expected_check_out_date IS NOT NULL
    AND expected_check_out_date < CURDATE()
    AND docstatus < 2
ORDER BY expected_check_out_date ASC
